title: Settings, Theme, and Locale Service Initialization
interaction_flow: Browser → globals.js: parse localStorage('user_preferences') → set window.user_preferences {language: navigator.language || 'en'}
Browser → globals.js: set window.locale = 'en' (static default)
Browser → initgui.js: call launch_services(options)
launch_services → services registry: register('broadcast', new BroadcastService())
launch_services → services registry: register('theme', new ThemeService())
launch_services → services registry: register('locale', new LocaleService())
launch_services → services registry: register('settings', new SettingsService())
launch_services → services registry: register('__launch-on-init', new LaunchOnInitService())
launch_services → [all instances]: instance.construct({ gui_params: options }) — sets this.$puter, calls _construct()
launch_services → [all instances]: instance.init({ services }) — sets this.services, calls _init()
Service.init() → ThemeService._init(): get BroadcastService via globalThis.services.get('broadcast')
ThemeService._init() → ThemeService: set default state {hue:210, sat:41.18, lig:93.33, alpha:0.8, light_text:false}
ThemeService._init() → DOM: document.querySelector(':root') → store as this.root
ThemeService._init() → puter.fs: read('~/.__puter_gui.json') [non-blocking .then()]
puter.fs → ThemeService [async callback]: return file data (Blob)
ThemeService [async callback] → ThemeService: data.text() → JSON.parse(data)
ThemeService [async callback] → ThemeService: merge data.colors into this.state
ThemeService [async callback] → ThemeService: reload_()
ThemeService.reload_() → DOM (:root): setProperty('--primary-hue', hue), setProperty('--primary-saturation', sat%), ...
ThemeService.reload_() → BroadcastService: sendBroadcast('themeChanged', {palette: {...}}, {sendToNewAppInstances: true})
puter.fs [on error 'subject_does_not_exist'] → ThemeService: silently ignore (no file = use defaults)
Service.init() → SettingsService._init(): register tabs [UsageTab, AccountTab, SecurityTab, PersonalizationTab, LanguageTab, KeyboardShortcutsTab, AboutTab]
SettingsService._init() → SettingsService.register_tab(tab): push each tab class into this.#tabs[]
Service.init() → LocaleService._init(): no _init defined — no-op at construction time
Service.init() → LaunchOnInitService._init(): read this.$puter.gui_params.launch_options
LaunchOnInitService._init() → LaunchOnInitService.run_(command): execute each on_initialized command (e.g. 'window-call')
launch_services [post-init] → ProcessService: svc_process.get_init().chstatus(PROCESS_RUNNING)
helpers.js window.update_user_preferences(prefs) → window: set window.locale = prefs.language ?? 'en'
helpers.js window.update_user_preferences(prefs) → BroadcastService: sendBroadcast('localeChanged', {language}, {sendToNewAppInstances: true})
key_relationships: Service.construct() delegates to _construct(); Service.init() delegates to _init()
ThemeService depends_on BroadcastService (fetched via globalThis.services.get at _init time)
ThemeService depends_on puter.fs (external FS API for persisting theme data)
SettingsService depends_on UIElement / TSettingsTab trait (for tab registration)
LocaleService depends_on i18n module (for format_duration only — not at init)
Locale state is managed by window.update_user_preferences() in helpers.js, NOT LocaleService._init()
launch_services uses inline services registry (not putility ServiceManager — that is server-side only)
All services go through two-phase init: construct() then init() in registration order
important_notes: GUI uses a simple inline services registry (services_l_[], services_m_{}) in launch_services(), NOT the putility ServiceManager (which is backend/Node.js only)
ThemeService._init() is non-blocking: puter.fs.read() uses .then()/.catch() — init() returns while file load is async
Default theme: hue=210, sat=41.18%, lig=93.33%, alpha=0.8. Theme persisted to ~/.__puter_gui.json
ThemeService save is debounced (SAVE_COOLDOWN_TIME = 1000ms) via save_() → setTimeout → commit_save_() → puter.fs.write()

LocaleService has NO _init() — only provides format_duration() helper. Actual locale/language init happens in globals.js (window.user_preferences from localStorage) and helpers.js (window.update_user_preferences → window.locale + localeChanged broadcast)
SettingsService._init() registers 7 tabs; tabs can be UIElement instances (adapted via TSettingsTab trait) or plain objects
LaunchOnInitService reads gui_params.launch_options.on_initialized at init time; supports 'window-call' command type
All service instances receive services reference via init({services}) enabling cross-service lookup
